## Shots and goals by team

```{r uc1}
shots_goals <- compute_team_shots_goals(events, match_id = match_id)

p1 <- viz_team_shots_goals(
  events,
  match_id = match_id,
  title = chart_titles$shots_goals,
  subtitle = subtitle,
  team_labels = team_labels
)
print(p1)
save_figure(
  p1,
  file.path(fig_dir, paste0("Shots_Goals_", slug, ".png")),
  format = "16_9"
)
```

```{r uc2}
p2 <- viz_team_shots_bar(
  shots_goals,
  title = chart_titles$shots_bar,
  subtitle = subtitle,
  fill_colors = team_colors,
  team_labels = team_labels
)
print(p2)
save_figure(
  p2,
  file.path(fig_dir, paste0("Shots_Bar_", slug, ".png")),
  format = "16_9"
)
```

## Shots per 90 minutes

```{r uc3}
p3 <- viz_player_shots_per90(
  events,
  player_match_stats_df = pms,
  match_id = match_id,
  min_minutes = 30,
  top_n = 10,
  title = chart_titles$shots_per90,
  subtitle = subtitle,
  team_labels = team_labels
)
print(p3)
save_figure(
  p3,
  file.path(fig_dir, paste0("Shots_Per90_", slug, ".png")),
  format = "4_5"
)
```

## Passes into the penalty area

```{r uc4}
top_passer <- events %>%
  filter(type.name == "Pass", is.na(pass.outcome.name), team.name == meta$home_team) %>%
  count(player.id, player.name, sort = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1)

p4 <- viz_player_pass_map(
  events,
  player_id = top_passer$player.id,
  match_id = match_id,
  title = player_chart_title(
    player_display_label(events, player_id = top_passer$player.id),
    chart_titles$pass_map_suffix
  ),
  subtitle = subtitle,
  box_only = TRUE
)
print(p4)
save_figure(
  p4,
  file.path(fig_dir, paste0("Pass_Map_", slug, ".png")),
  format = "16_9"
)
```

## Expected goal contribution

```{r uc5}
p5 <- viz_xg_xga_contribution(
  events,
  player_match_stats_df = pms,
  match_id = match_id,
  min_minutes = 30,
  top_n = 12,
  title = chart_titles$xg_contribution,
  subtitle = subtitle
)
print(p5)
save_figure(
  p5,
  file.path(fig_dir, paste0("xG_Contribution_", slug, ".png")),
  format = "16_9"
)
```

## Defensive action heatmaps

```{r uc6, fig.height=5.2}
iterate_sdc_palette(function(color_name, color_hex, palette_key) {
  p6 <- viz_defensive_heatmap(
    events,
    match_id = match_id,
    title = paste(chart_titles$defensive_heatmap, paste0("(", color_name, ")")),
    subtitle = subtitle,
    team_labels = team_labels,
    heat_color = color_hex
  )
  print(p6)
  save_figure(
    p6,
    file.path(fig_dir, paste0("Defensive_Heatmap_", slug, "_", color_name, ".png")),
    format = "16_9"
  )
})
```

```{r shot-maps-setup, include=FALSE}
shot_map_scope <- params$shot_map_scope %||% "full"
shot_map_iterate_palette <- if (is.null(params$shot_map_iterate_palette)) {
  TRUE
} else {
  isTRUE(params$shot_map_iterate_palette)
}
shot_map_icon_set <- params$shot_map_icon_set %||% "footprint"
goal_net_use_ball_icons <- if (is.null(params$goal_net_use_ball_icons)) {
  TRUE
} else {
  isTRUE(params$goal_net_use_ball_icons)
}

featured_player <- resolve_featured_player(events, params$featured_icon_player)

render_player_shot_map_goal_net <- function(player_info) {
  draw_map <- function(color_name, color_hex) {
    p8 <- viz_shot_map_goal_net(
      events,
      player_id = player_info$player.id,
      match_id = match_id,
      title = player_chart_title(
        player_info$player_label,
        chart_titles$shot_map_goal_net_suffix
      ),
      subtitle = subtitle,
      shot_color = color_hex,
      show_trajectories = TRUE,
      icon_set = shot_map_icon_set,
      goal_net_use_ball_icons = goal_net_use_ball_icons
    )
    print(p8)
    suffix <- if (shot_map_iterate_palette) paste0("_", color_name) else ""
    save_figure(
      p8,
      file.path(
        fig_dir,
        paste0("Shot_Map_Goal_Net_", player_info$slug, suffix, ".png")
      ),
      format = "4_5"
    )
  }

  if (shot_map_iterate_palette) {
    iterate_sdc_palette(draw_map)
  } else {
    draw_map("Primary", params$home_color %||% SDC_PALETTE[["blue"]])
  }
}

if (shot_map_scope != "featured_only") {
  if (!is.null(params$featured_left_foot_player)) {
    left_foot_player <- resolve_featured_player(events, params$featured_left_foot_player)
  } else {
    left_foot_shooter <- top_left_foot_shooter(
      events,
      match_id = match_id,
      team_name = meta$home_team
    )
    left_foot_player <- list(
      player.id = left_foot_shooter$player.id,
      player.name = left_foot_shooter$player.name,
      player_label = left_foot_shooter$player_label,
      slug = figure_slug(left_foot_shooter$player_label)
    )
  }

  scorer <- top_goal_scorer(events, match_id = match_id, team_name = meta$home_team)
}
```

```{r shot-maps-featured-only-header, eval=shot_map_scope == "featured_only", results="asis"}
cat("## Shot map — ", featured_player$player_label, "\n\n", sep = "")
```

```{r shot-maps-featured-only, fig.height=8, eval=shot_map_scope == "featured_only"}
render_player_shot_map_goal_net(featured_player)
```

```{r shot-maps-full-players-header, eval=shot_map_scope != "featured_only", results="asis"}
cat(
  "## Shot maps — players\n\n",
  "### Top goal scorer — ", scorer$player_label, "\n\n",
  sep = ""
)
```

```{r uc8-top-scorer, fig.height=8, eval=shot_map_scope != "featured_only"}
render_player_shot_map_goal_net(scorer)
```

```{r shot-maps-full-featured-header, eval=shot_map_scope != "featured_only", results="asis"}
cat("### ", featured_player$player_label, "\n\n", sep = "")
```

```{r uc8-featured-player, fig.height=8, eval=shot_map_scope != "featured_only"}
render_player_shot_map_goal_net(featured_player)
```

```{r shot-maps-full-left-foot-header, eval=shot_map_scope != "featured_only", results="asis"}
cat("### ", left_foot_player$player_label, " — left foot\n\n", sep = "")
```

```{r uc8-left-foot, fig.height=8, eval=shot_map_scope != "featured_only"}
render_player_shot_map_goal_net(left_foot_player)
```

```{r shot-maps-teams-header, eval=shot_map_scope != "featured_only", results="asis"}
cat("## Shot maps — teams\n\n")
```

```{r shot-maps-full-home-header, eval=shot_map_scope != "featured_only", results="asis"}
cat("### ", team_labels[[meta$home_team]], "\n\n", sep = "")
```

```{r uc8-home-team, fig.height=8, eval=shot_map_scope != "featured_only"}
home_label <- team_labels[[meta$home_team]]

p8_home <- viz_shot_map_goal_net(
  events,
  team_name = meta$home_team,
  match_id = match_id,
  team_labels = team_labels,
  title = player_chart_title(home_label, chart_titles$team_shot_map_goal_net_suffix),
  subtitle = subtitle,
  shot_color = team_colors[[meta$home_team]],
  show_trajectories = TRUE,
  icon_set = shot_map_icon_set,
  goal_net_use_ball_icons = goal_net_use_ball_icons
)
print(p8_home)
save_figure(
  p8_home,
  file.path(
    fig_dir,
    paste0("Shot_Map_Goal_Net_Team_", figure_slug(home_label), ".png")
  ),
  format = "4_5"
)
```

```{r shot-maps-full-away-header, eval=shot_map_scope != "featured_only", results="asis"}
cat("### ", team_labels[[meta$away_team]], "\n\n", sep = "")
```

```{r uc8-away-team, fig.height=8, eval=shot_map_scope != "featured_only"}
away_label <- team_labels[[meta$away_team]]

p8_away <- viz_shot_map_goal_net(
  events,
  team_name = meta$away_team,
  match_id = match_id,
  team_labels = team_labels,
  title = player_chart_title(away_label, chart_titles$team_shot_map_goal_net_suffix),
  subtitle = subtitle,
  shot_color = team_colors[[meta$away_team]],
  show_trajectories = TRUE,
  icon_set = shot_map_icon_set,
  goal_net_use_ball_icons = goal_net_use_ball_icons
)
print(p8_away)
save_figure(
  p8_away,
  file.path(
    fig_dir,
    paste0("Shot_Map_Goal_Net_Team_", figure_slug(away_label), ".png")
  ),
  format = "4_5"
)
```

---

Figures saved to: `r fig_dir`
